meaning: n.鸟鸣声,喋喋不休,慌张vi.啭,鸟鸣,摆动vt.嘁嘁喳喳地讲,抖动
examples: His medical centre also has a Facebook page, a MySpace page and a Twitter feed.
One Twitter group is offering its followers single-sentence-long "digests" of the great novels.
I've found quite a few, and—since I started posting them on Twitter—they have been causing quite a stir.
Deprived of capital, young companies not named Facebook or Twitter prematurely stagnate or sell out.
He has time for his career, golf and Twitter, but online dating is just too time-consuming.
